turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh, hello—I'm calling to

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, yeah,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, um,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, this is Paul. I'm calling about my right knee—been having some issues and want to set up an appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s February 15th, 1988.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Paul.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is this a new issue with your right knee or are you following up on a previous visit?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it's a new issue, started a few weeks ago after a run.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to schedule a general office visit to have your right knee checked out?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’s what I’m looking to do. What times do you have open?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider or are you open to seeing anyone available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m open to anyone available, just want to get it checked out soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are no open appointments available this week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to check for openings next week or is there a specific date that works best for you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, could you check what’s open early next week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I found a few openings for early next week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: On Tuesday, July 7th, you can see Dr. Zbigniew Lukoski at 2 p.m. or 3 p.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or Dr. Kelly Noble at 10 a.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do any of these times work for you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, let me go with Dr. Kelly Noble at 10 a.m. on Tuesday.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for Tuesday, July 7th at 10 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else you'd like help with?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I think that covers it. Thanks a lot.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set, Paul.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: We look forward to seeing you at your appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Have a great day.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks, you too. Take care.
